info.name: OCM Request for Share
info.description:
Implements the OCM "Request for a Share" flow as defined in the cs3org OCM specification. A receiving user (or server) asks the owner of a resource to share it; the owner accepts or declines, optionally triggering a Share Creation Notification back to the requester.
Also exposes an out-of-band public dataset registry so owners can advertise shareable resources to other federation peers. The registry is a Nextcloud convention — it is intentionally not advertised via OCM discovery.
Both halves of the app are independent and can be enabled or disabled separately.
info.author: SUNET
